com.mentor.chs.api.dataexchange.teamcenter

Interface IXPLMXMLTransformer

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXPlugin

    public interface IXPLMXMLTransformer
extends IXPlugin
    You need to implement this interface if the intent is to exchange the data(Report) from Capital to Teamcenter.

    You will need to register the IXPLMXMLTransformer with the help of IXTeamcneterReportExchangeRegistrar.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.io.InputStream transformToPLMXML(java.io.InputStream dataToBeExchanged)
      If the IXPLMXMLTransformer is registered with the registrar, then the report exchange routine will pass the generated report output to this implementation.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion

    • Method Detail

      • transformToPLMXML

        java.io.InputStream transformToPLMXML(java.io.InputStream dataToBeExchanged)
        If the IXPLMXMLTransformer is registered with the registrar, then the report exchange routine will pass the generated report output to this implementation. It is upto the implementor to convert the report output to the appropriate PLMXML format and return it.
        Parameters:
        dataToBeExchanged - The data to be exchanged
        Returns:
        Modified PLXXML output
